title: Emma's Big Feelings
synopsis: Emma learns to understand and express her big feelings with help from her loving family, discovering that all emotions are okay to feel.

pages.text: Emma was having a big feeling day. When her tower of blocks fell down, angry red swirls filled her chest. She stomped her feet and made growling sounds like a bear.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks stands next to fallen blocks, surrounded by angry red swirls and jagged lines representing her mad feelings
illustration.alt: Emma looking upset with red swirls around her and fallen toy blocks

pages.text: Mama came over with gentle arms. 'I see you're feeling mad, Emma,' she said softly. 'Mad feelings are okay. Let's take three deep breaths together and count to ten.'

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks being hugged by her mama, with red swirls slowly fading to softer pink clouds around them
illustration.alt: Emma being comforted by her mother with calming colors

pages.text: Later, Emma's favorite stuffed bunny got dirty. Sad blue raindrops seemed to fall all around her heart. She felt like crying, and that was okay too.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks holding a dirty stuffed bunny, surrounded by blue rain drops and gray-blue clouds representing sadness
illustration.alt: Emma looking sad while holding her dirty stuffed animal with blue rain imagery

pages.text: Daddy sat down beside her. 'Sad feelings need hugs,' he said. They washed bunny together in warm soapy water. Soon the blue rain turned into gentle, healing blue waves.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks washing her bunny with daddy at the sink, blue rain transforming into gentle blue waves and lighter colors
illustration.alt: Emma and her father washing the stuffed bunny with calming blue waves

pages.text: At bedtime, Emma snuggled with clean bunny. Happy yellow sunshine filled her whole body. She giggled and felt warm golden sparkles dancing around her.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks cuddling her clean bunny in bed, surrounded by bright yellow sunshine rays and golden sparkles representing joy
illustration.alt: Emma happily cuddling her clean bunny with yellow sunshine and sparkles

pages.text: 'All feelings are important,' Mama said, tucking Emma in. 'Mad, sad, happy - they all live in your heart. Tomorrow we'll have more feelings to explore together.'

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks being tucked into bed by mama, with a rainbow of gentle colors (red, blue, yellow) swirling peacefully around them representing all emotions in harmony
illustration.alt: Emma being tucked in by her mother with rainbow colors representing balanced emotions

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color were Emma's mad feelings?
questions.explanation: Emma's angry feelings looked like red swirls around her when her blocks fell down.

questions.question: How did Mama help Emma with her mad feelings?
choices: She helped her take deep breaths
She made her go to her room
questions.explanation: Mama helped Emma feel better by taking three deep breaths together and counting to ten.

questions.question: What made Emma feel sad?
questions.explanation: Emma felt sad when her favorite stuffed bunny got dirty, and it felt like blue raindrops around her heart.

questions.question: What did Emma learn about feelings?
questions.explanation: Emma learned that all feelings - mad, sad, and happy - are important and live in her heart.
